title: ziziphora galinae
intro: Ziziphora galinae, also known as Persian mint or Russian tarragon, is a perennial herb native to Asia and Eastern Europe, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ziziphora galinae include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Ziziphora galinae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in culinary dishes.
